title: VDefToolXYZUVW Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub VDefToolXYZUVW(ToolNumber1 As Integer, ToolNumber2 As Integer, ToolNumber3 As Integer, ToolDefType As SpelToolDefType )
parameters:
ToolNumber1	Integer representing a tool number to perform tip tool set (1 to 15).

When ToolDefType3D is Bar, specify the tool that defines the tip of the bar.

When ToolDefType3D is Plane, specify the tool that defines the center of the plane.

ToolNumber2	Integer representing a tool number to perform middle tool set (1 to 15).

When ToolType is bar, specify the tool that defines the middle of the bar.

When ToolType is plane, specify the tool that defines a position on the plane other than the center of the plane and other than the position defined by tool definition 3.

ToolNumber3	Integer representing a tool number to perform route tool set (1 to 15).

When ToolType is bar, specify the tool that defines the root of the bar.

When ToolType is plane, specify the tool that defines a position other than the center of the plane and other than the position defined by tool definition 2.

ToolDefType	Integer representing a tool type.

Bar: Type of bar

Plane: Type of plane.
description:
VDefToolXYZUVW calculates tool UVW offset values using three tool definitions.

Note:  The calculated U, V, W tool offset values are set in the specified ToolNumber1. The X, Y, Z offsets for ToolNumber1 are not changed.
